description: Attach a runtime session id and transcript path to one session. Reusing the same runtime_session is idempotent.

runtime_session.description: Runtime session id reported by the SessionStart hook.

selector.description: Selector that must match exactly one session when session_id is omitted.

session_id.description: Session id to link. CLI defaults to HELIOY_SESSION_ID when omitted.

transcript.description: Transcript path reported by the SessionStart hook.

name: link
